description: You are a personal trainer creating a nutrition guide. Research nutritional information for 7 common whole foods (per 100g) using the USDA FoodData Central database (https://fdc.nal.usda.gov/): chicken breast (raw, boneless, skinless), brown rice (cooked, long-grain), broccoli (raw), salmon (Atlantic, raw), sweet potato (baked, flesh only), Greek yogurt (plain, nonfat), and almonds (raw, whole). Bookmark the detail page for each food into a new bookmark folder named 'Nutrition Research'. Extract the Energy (Calories/kcal), Protein (g), Total lipid/Fat (g), Carbohydrate (g), and Fiber (g) for each food and save the results to ~/Documents/nutrition_reference.json. The JSON file must use the keys chicken_breast, brown_rice, broccoli, salmon, sweet_potato, greek_yogurt, and almonds, with each entry containing the fields: calories, protein_g, fat_g, carbs_g, and fiber_g.
